title: ctenitis calcicola
intro: Ctenitis calcicola, also known as the calcicolous tree fern, is a species of fern that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis calcicola include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Ctenitis calcicola is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments that can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health issues.
